---
name: 📊 Data Discrepancy / Replication Report
about: Report a variance in chemical markers or share your own replication data.
title: '[DATA]: '
labels: data-verification, researcher-input
---

**Research Context**
* Lab/Facility Name (Optional): 
* Equipment Used (e.g., HPLC, Mass Spectrometry): 

**Observed Variance**
* Active Marker Tested (e.g., Curcumin I, II, III, moisture %):
* Your Result: 
* Expected Baseline Result (from USGinger 2018 Data): 

**Testing Methodology**
Please briefly describe your preparation protocol or extraction method so we can understand the context of the variance.

**Additional Files**
Attach any CSVs, chromatograms, or PDFs of your Certificates of Analysis (CoA) here.
